# Sale Order UBL Import Customer Free Ref

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This is a glue module between `sale_order_import_ubl` and `sale_order_customer_free_ref`.
It extracts the `CurstomerReference`, from the XML received.
